description: Create a custom navigation sidebar for the 'Engineering Handbook' project wiki by establishing a special wiki page named 'Sidebar'. The sidebar content must feature a '### Quick Links' header and a bulleted list linking to '[[Coding Standards]]', '[[Deployment Procedures]]', and '[[Onboarding Checklist]]'. Additionally, create these three target pages with placeholder text (e.g., 'TODO') to ensure the sidebar links are functional and valid.
